chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for Someone Who Shortens a Circuit in the Hijr

text: 2806 - رَوَى اِبْنُ مُسْكَانَ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ قَالَ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ رَجُلٌ طَافَ بِالْبَيْتِ فَاخْتَصَرَ شَوْطاً وَاحِداً فِي اَلْحِجْرِ كَيْفَ يَصْنَعُ قَالَ «يُعِيدُ اَلطَّوَافَ اَلْوَاحِدَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2806 - Ibn Muskan narrated from al-Halabi, who said: I said to Abu Abdullah (as), "A man performed tawaf around the Kaaba but shortened one circuit by passing through the Hijr (Hijr Ismail). What should he do?"
Imam (as) said: "He must repeat that one circuit."
